mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, lab_id, title, start_time, end_time, attendees, remark, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{labId}, #{title}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{attendees}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.lab_id, r.title, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.attendees, r.remark, r.status, r.reject_reason, r.cancel_time, r.create_time, r.update_time, l.name AS lab_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN lab l ON l.id = r.lab_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, l.name AS lab_name, u.username, u.real_name FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN `lab` l ON l.id = r.lab_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = 3, cancel_time = #{cancelTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM reservation r WHERE r.status = 1 AND r.start_time BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice n WHERE n.reservation_id = r.id AND n.type = 3 )

SELECT DATE(r.create_time) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_count FROM reservation r WHERE r.create_time >= #{startTime} AND r.create_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(r.create_time) ORDER BY stat_date ASC
